calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-12-2021 Vacated

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Mar-05-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JAEMIN CHANG, Esq. of Fox Rothschild LLP (Tel: 415-364-5551) for plaintiff Jean-Christopher Klein;
Atty. CHRISTOPHER H. HART, Esq. of Nuti Hart LLP (Tel: 510-506-7154) as movant/counsel-of-record for defendants Swyft, Inc., Gower Smith, Richard.

HEARING RE: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD RE: DEFENDANTS.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear.

Matter discussed. Defense counsel is to provide plaintiff's counsel with defendants' contact information for service.

The Court conducts an unreported in camera telephone conference with defense counsel.

The Court grants the motion to be relieved as counsel.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2020 Set For Trial On Jul-26-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
